Description: This is a P-Channel MOSFET utilizing advanced trench technology, designed for efficient power switching in a compact SOT-23 package. Its primary function is to act as a voltage-controlled switch, where a negative gate-source voltage turns the device on, allowing a high continuous drain current (up to -4.1A) to flow with a very low on-state resistance. It is characterized by excellent RDS(on) performance and low gate charge, making it suitable for applications like load/power switching, interfacing, and logic level shifting.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal. A negative voltage relative to the source turns the MOSFET on.
Output/load terminal for the switched current.
Input/power terminal. Typically connected to the supply rail.
